HOME.ABOUT_SNUSCO: Welcome to SnusCo, your trusted destination for premium, tobacco-free nicotine products. Since our inception, we've been committed to delivering top-quality nicotine pouches to customers who value safety, transparency, and exceptional taste.
HOME.FEATURED_BRANDS: At SnusCo, we proudly feature a curated selection of the most popular brands, including.
HOME.FEATURED_BRANDS_2: Each product is rigorously tested to meet the highest standards, ensuring you receive nothing but the best. Whether you're new to nicotine pouches or a seasoned user, we offer insights and recommendations to help you find the perfect fit.
HOME.SHOPPING_EXPERIENCE: Our website is designed to provide a seamless shopping experience, complete with fast, reliable shipping. We prioritize customer safety through robust age verification processes, fostering a secure and responsible community.
HOME.TOBACCO_FREE_LIFESTYLE: Discover the freedom of a tobacco-free lifestyle with SnusCo. We're here to support you with expert advice, educational resources, and a commitment to quality that empowers you to make informed choices. Choose SnusCo – where excellence and care come together.
HOME.PROMO_INTRO: Discover the best selection of <nicotine>tobacco-free nicotine pouches</nicotine>, and <free>nicotine free pouches</free> at Haypp UK. Whether you're looking for top-selling products, new arrivals, or the latest brands, we've got you covered.

TRUST.ABOUT_P1: SnusCo is built for adults who want tobacco-free nicotine pouches without the noise: real brands, clear strengths, and descriptions you can use to choose with confidence.
TRUST.ABOUT_P2: We take age verification and responsible retail seriously — every order is checked so nicotine stays in the right hands.
TRUST.ABOUT_P3: Our team is here when you need help picking a format, flavour, or strength — whether you are trying pouches for the first time or refreshing your rotation.
TRUST.WHY_INTRO: From bestsellers to new arrivals, SnusCo brings nicotine pouches from brands you know together in one place — packed and shipped with care for customers in Austria.

PRODUCT.TAXES_TITLE: Taxes on SnusCo Orders in Austria
PRODUCT.TAXES_DESCRIPTION: At SnusCo, we are committed to complying with Austrian tax laws. For all online orders, applicable taxes, including nicotine taxes and VAT (sales tax), are calculated and included in the order total during checkout. Shipping charges may also be subject to VAT in Austria, depending on the region and applicable laws.
PRODUCT.TAXES_CALCULATION_TITLE: How is the Tax on Nicotine Products Calculated?
PRODUCT.TAXES_CALCULATION_DESCRIPTION: Nicotine Excise Tax (TNET), often referred to as 'nicotine tax,' is applied in accordance with Austrian federal regulations. The method of calculation depends on the type of product (Tobacco or Tobacco-Free) and the category it falls into. Taxes are calculated in one of the following ways:
PRODUCT.TAXES_CALCULATION_METHOD_1: Based on a percentage of the wholesale price: Calculated as a percentage of the product's cost to SnusCo.
PRODUCT.TAXES_CALCULATION_METHOD_2: Based on SnusCo’s selling price to the customer: Calculated as a percentage of the retail price.
PRODUCT.TAXES_CALCULATION_METHOD_3: Based on weight: Calculated per gram or per unit of the product.
PRODUCT.VAT_CALCULATION_TITLE: How Does SnusCo Calculate VAT on Orders?
PRODUCT.VAT_CALCULATION_DESCRIPTION: VAT is calculated in accordance with Austrian tax regulations and is applied to both the product price and, in most cases, the shipping cost. The current Austrian VAT rate for nicotine products is 20%. This ensures full compliance with local tax requirements.

SHOP.TITLE: Shop Nicotine Pouches
SHOP.DESCRIPTION: Browse our full selection of nicotine pouches from popular brands. Use filters for brand, format, and strength, or sort by price, date, or name. Shipped from Austria with fast delivery across Europe.

FLAVOUR_HUB.TITLE: Shop by flavour
FLAVOUR_HUB.DESCRIPTION: Browse the full range and narrow results using the flavour filter — mint, fruit, citrus and more.

STRENGTH_HUB.TITLE: Shop by strength
STRENGTH_HUB.DESCRIPTION: Browse the full range and narrow results using the strength filter — from low to ultra strong.

mint.TITLE: Mint & fresh nicotine pouches
mint.DESCRIPTION: Cooling mint, spearmint and menthol — crisp, discreet pouches for a fresh feel anytime.

fruit_berry.TITLE: Fruit & berry nicotine pouches
fruit_berry.DESCRIPTION: Strawberry, berry and juicy fruit blends — sweet profiles from brands you already love.

citrus.TITLE: Citrus nicotine pouches
citrus.DESCRIPTION: Lemon, lime, orange and grapefruit notes — bright, zesty flavours with a clean finish.

coffee_sweet.TITLE: Coffee, chocolate & sweet pouches
coffee_sweet.DESCRIPTION: Coffee, cocoa, caramel and dessert-style notes — rich and smooth when you want something sweeter.

liquorice.TITLE: Liquorice & anise nicotine pouches
liquorice.DESCRIPTION: Classic salty-sweet liquorice and mild anise — bold Nordic-style profiles.

other.TITLE: More flavours
other.DESCRIPTION: Explore pouches that don’t fit one box — unique blends and limited profiles in one place.

low.TITLE: Low strength nicotine pouches (0–5 mg)
low.DESCRIPTION: Mild nicotine levels for a lighter feel — ideal when you want less intensity and easy all-day use.

normal.TITLE: Normal strength nicotine pouches (5–9 mg)
normal.DESCRIPTION: Balanced everyday pouches in the medium range — familiar strength from leading brands.

strong.TITLE: Strong nicotine pouches (9–15 mg)
strong.DESCRIPTION: Higher delivery for experienced users — covers medium-strong to strong pouch profiles.

extra_strong.TITLE: Extra strong nicotine pouches (15–17 mg)
extra_strong.DESCRIPTION: Very strong pouches for those who prefer a pronounced nicotine kick.

ultra_strong.TITLE: Ultra strong nicotine pouches (17+ mg)
ultra_strong.DESCRIPTION: Maximum strength range — for users who want the strongest pouch options available.
